newGameFlow.leaderPrompt: What shall your people call you?

tribalVillage.goldMetal: You have discovered valuable metal deposits worth {{amount}}$.
tribalVillage.advancedTribe:
You have discovered an advanced tribe!
A band of settlers joins your civilization.
tribalVillage.mercenaries:
You have discovered a friendly tribe of skilled mercenaries!
A {{unit}} joins your forces.
tribalVillage.technology:
You have discovered scrolls of ancient wisdom!
Your civilization has learned: {{tech}}
tribalVillage.barbarians: You have unleashed a horde of barbarians!

resourceDescriptions.wheat: Fields of wheat boost food production, allowing cities to grow faster.
resourceDescriptions.fish: Rich fishing grounds that supplement a city's food supply from the sea.
resourceDescriptions.seal: Seal hunting grounds on the coast provide valuable food in cold climates.
resourceDescriptions.game: Wild game in forests and plains that hunters can harvest for food.
resourceDescriptions.oasis: A life-giving oasis in the desert, dramatically increasing food in an arid region.
resourceDescriptions.coal: Coal deposits that fuel industry and dramatically increase shield production.
resourceDescriptions.horses: Grasslands with wild horses that can be tamed to power cavalry units and production.
resourceDescriptions.iron: Iron ore deposits essential for forging weapons and boosting industrial output.
resourceDescriptions.oil: Oil reserves that provide a massive boost to industrial production.
resourceDescriptions.gem: Precious gemstones that are highly valuable in trade with other civilizations.
resourceDescriptions.gems: Precious gemstones that are highly valuable in trade with other civilizations.
resourceDescriptions.gold: Gold deposits — the most valuable trade resource in the ancient and medieval world.

statusPanel.goldTaxTitle: Click to open Tax Rate settings
statusPanel.queueBarTitle: Click to see all units waiting to move

settings.title: Settings
settings.requireEndTurnHelp: When off, the turn automatically advances once all units have moved. When on, you must manually press End Turn.
settings.enableLoggingHelp: When enabled, debug messages from all game systems are printed to the browser console. Disabled by default for performance.
settings.gameDifficultyHelp: Change the difficulty mid-game. Affects AI production speed, research costs, city growth, and barbarian activity.
settings.skipInitialViewHelp: When enabled, the title screen and new-game dialogs are bypassed and the game starts immediately.
settings.autopilotHelp: When enabled, your civilization is also controlled by the AI. The entire game runs on autopilot.

scenario.title: Select New Scenario
scenario.intro: Choose a map scenario for your new game:
scenario.civ1: Civ 1 Style - Classic Civilization 1 map generation

cityModal.growthNeedsSewer: ⚠️ Needs Sewer System to grow beyond size 12
cityModal.growthNeedsAqueduct: ⚠️ Needs Aqueduct to grow beyond size 10

buildingCompletion.bodyForeignWonder: {{name}} has been built in a far away place by the {{civ}}.
buildingCompletion.defaultDescription: A new building has been constructed.
buildingCompletion.effectVeteranUnits: New units built here are veterans

defeat.title: Defeat!
defeat.message: The {{defeated}} have been defeated by the mighty {{victor}}.

government.title: 🏛️ Choose Form of Government
government.prompt: The period of Anarchy is over. Choose a new form of government:

production.militaryAdviceDefault: We should build Militia to defend our cities.
production.domesticAdviceDefault: We should build a Granary to encourage city growth.
production.militaryAdviceNaval: We should build {{name}} to control the seas.
production.militaryAdviceDefend: We should build {{name}} to defend our cities.
production.militaryAdviceNoWater: Naval units require water access. Our land forces are adequate.
production.domesticAdviceWonder: We could build {{name}} - a great wonder that will bring glory to our civilization!
production.domesticAdviceGranary: We should build a Granary to encourage city growth.
production.domesticAdviceTemple: We should build a Temple to keep citizens happy.
production.domesticAdviceLibrary: We should build a Library to advance our knowledge.
production.domesticAdviceGeneric: We should build a {{name}} to improve our city.
production.domesticAdviceHydroNoWater: Hydro Plant requires water access. Consider other power sources.
production.domesticAdviceInOrder: Our domestic affairs are in order.
production.helpWonderIntro: This is a WONDER - a great achievement that can only be built once in the world!
production.helpSelectOptionFirst: Select a production option to see more information.

scienceAdvisor.title: Science Advisor:
scienceAdvisor.prompt: Which discovery should our wise men be pursuing, sire? Pick one...
scienceAdvisor.helpSelectFirst: Please select a technology from the list first, then click Help again.

techDiscovery.researchDone: Our wise men have completed their research!
techDiscovery.unlocksNone: No new units, buildings, or improvements

mood.amiable: 😊 The leader is in good spirits and welcomes your presence.
mood.cautious: 😐 The leader is cautious but willing to talk.
mood.neutral: 😶 The leader is impassive and hard to read.
mood.hostile: 😤 The leader is visibly irritated by your arrival.
mood.demanding: 😠 The leader leans forward aggressively, making demands.
mood.aggressive: 👿 The leader is furious and barely restraining open hostility!
mood.fearful: 😨 The leader is pale and trembling, clearly frightened of your power.

warReply.fearful: {{leader}} looks shocked. "So be it! If you choose the path of bloodshed, we shall defend ourselves to the last!"
warReply.amiable: {{leader}} sighs heavily. "A tragic day for our peoples. The rivers will run red with the blood of this betrayal."
warReply.default: {{leader}} laughs coldly. "Fools! You bring about your own destruction! Our armies will crush you into the dust!"

speech.goldAggressive: Your empire is beneath mine. Pay {{gold}} gold as tribute, or face total annihilation!
speech.goldCalm: We require {{gold}} gold from your treasury to maintain... goodwill between our peoples.
speech.techAggressive: You possess knowledge of {{tech}} that belongs to us. Hand it over — or declare war!
speech.techCalm: In the interest of shared prosperity, we would ask you to share your knowledge of {{tech}} with us.
speech.peaceFearful: {{leader}} approaches humbly. Our people beg for peace! We shall offer anything to end this war.
speech.peaceCalm: The time has come for our civilizations to lay down arms and forge a lasting peace.
speech.tradeOffer: We offer knowledge of {{offered}} in exchange for your knowledge of {{demanded}}. Shall we trade?
speech.warDeclareAggressive: {{leader}} slams a fist on the table. Your time is up! The {{civ}} hereby declares WAR upon your pathetic empire. Prepare to be crushed!
speech.warDeclareDemanding: {{leader}} rises slowly. You have tested our patience for the last time. The {{civ}} is now at WAR with your people.
speech.warDeclareDefault: {{leader}} delivers the message coldly. The {{civ}} considers your civilization an enemy. We are at WAR.
speech.withdrawUnits: Your military forces approach our borders uninvited. Withdraw them immediately, or we shall consider it an act of war!
speech.allyVs: Our mutual interests would be served by crushing the {{target}}. Join us in declaring war upon them, and we shall reward your loyalty handsomely.
speech.aiGreetAmiable: Greetings! I am {{leader}} of the {{civ}}. Our scouts report your people nearby. We hope for a long and prosperous friendship!
speech.aiGreetHostile: {{leader}} scowls as your envoy approaches. So... your kind finally shows itself. State your business — and make it quick.
speech.aiGreetCautious: {{leader}} studies you carefully. Our peoples have not met before. Speak — what do you seek from the {{civ}}?
speech.aiGreetDefault: {{leader}} raises a hand in greeting. We have discovered one another at last. What say you — shall we be friends or enemies?
speech.playerGreetAmiable: Greetings from {{civ}}! We look forward to a prosperous relationship between our peoples.
speech.playerGreetHostile: {{leader}} eyes you with suspicion. What brings your emissary to our palace?
speech.playerGreetDefault: {{leader}} receives your envoy. State your purpose.

ui.payGoldDesc: Satisfy their demand and maintain peace.
ui.refuseDemandDesc: This may provoke a declaration of war.
ui.giveTechDesc: Hand over the technology to appease their demand.
ui.outcomeHandedTech: 📜 You handed over {{tech}}. The demand is satisfied.
ui.refuseSecrets: Refuse to hand over our secrets
ui.refuseSecretsDesc: They may declare war in response.
ui.statusDemandRescinded: 😤 The demand is rescinded for now.
ui.acceptPeaceDesc: End all hostilities and establish peace.
ui.senatePeace: The Senate forces us to accept peace
ui.senatePeaceDesc: Your democratic government will not allow continued war.
ui.statusSenatePeace: 🏛️ The Senate has signed the peace treaty over your objections.
ui.acceptTradeDesc: They will take one technology from you in return.
ui.outcomeTechExchanged: 🔬 Technology exchanged! You received {{received}} and gave {{given}}.
ui.acknowledgeWar: So be it. We accept this act of war.
ui.acknowledgeWarDesc: You cannot prevent this declaration of war.
ui.agreeWithdrawDesc: Pull back your units from their border.
ui.statusWithdraw: Your forces will withdraw from the border.
ui.declareWarOnDesc: Honor the alliance and enter the war.
ui.statusYouDeclaredWar: ⚔️ You have declared war on the {{civ}}!
ui.declineAllianceDesc: You will not join their war.
ui.proposePeaceDesc: Suggest a formal end to hostilities.
ui.proposeTechTradeDesc: Offer to trade technologies with them.
ui.giftTech: Give them a technology as a gift
ui.giftTechDesc: Improves relations at no immediate cost to you.
ui.panelSelectTechGift: Select a technology to give as a gift:
ui.proposeJointWarDesc: Invite them to jointly declare war on another civilization.
ui.panelSelectCivWar: Select a civilization to declare war on:
ui.outcomeJointWarYes: ⚔️ {{leader}} agrees! Our civilizations shall jointly declare war on the {{civ}}!
ui.outcomeJointWarNo: 😐 {{leader}} declines. They have no interest in warring against the {{civ}} at this time.
ui.askAttackDesc: Request a military alliance against a common foe.
ui.statusAttackDecline: 😐 They politely decline the military proposal.
ui.declareWarDesc: Openly declare war on this civilization.
ui.continueWarDesc: End the audience and prepare for war.
ui.farewellDesc: End the audience without further discussion.

dialogs.confirmQuit: Are you sure you want to quit?
dialogs.declareWarBody:
Moving onto this tile will declare war on the {{civ}}!

Do you wish to proceed?
dialogs.saveGameSuccess: Game has been saved to a JSON file.
dialogs.loadGameError: Failed to load save file. The file may be invalid or incompatible.
dialogs.revolutionConfirm: Are you sure you want to revolt? Your government will collapse into Anarchy.
dialogs.revolutionStartBody:
Your civilization will enter a period of Anarchy (2-5 turns)
before you can choose a new government.

Proceed?
dialogs.revolutionNoOtherGov: No other governments are available yet. Research government technologies first.
dialogs.scienceSelectTech: Select a technology to research. Some technologies may require more science points than others, but you must discover the costs through experimentation!
dialogs.loadSavedSoon: Load a Saved Game – coming soon!
dialogs.aboutBody:
CivWin - A Civilization-like game built with TypeScript and HTML5 Canvas

Version 1.0
Developed with Vite and modern web technologies
